title: Package Design, Modules, Versions, Workspaces, and Dependency Provenance · Go Semantics Case: Workspaces Multimodule
summary: A team must split a command and library, publish a stable module, test a two-module workspace, and review dependency changes. Planned artifact: Add and verify the go workspaces multimodule increment in a versioned multi-package module plan. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use go.work for local multi-module development while proving builds remain correct outside the workspace.
Explain semantic import versioning, minimal version selection, module graphs, sums, proxies, and private-module boundaries.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
